title: Lootify (Structures)
description: Lets you change loot tables of structures with a GUI
body:
This mod will allow you to customise loot tables of each spawnable structure!

Works on modded structures!

Easily add / remove items with the in game GUI.

New creative tab that adds Enchanted book and Potions that have no effects, these can be used to put in a loot table and they will spawn with random properties.

To use -

/Lootify populate - This will populate all spawnable structures into the GUI including modded structures. (This command may take a long time to generate if you have alot of structure mods installed!)

/Lootify config - This will allow you to access the loot tables for each structure.

/Lootify spawn - Gives the ability to spawn specific loot chests per structure though GUI for testing pourposes. Spawn count is configurable in config file so you can spawn as many chests as you like at once. (Default 10)

/Lootify reload - This is used after making changes in the GUI or config file.

Use the config file to change the rarity of each item or how many chests spawn.

Global loot table chest (Ender chest) will ignore all other loot tables, items inside the global chest will spawn in every structure.

Report bugs / suggestions in my [Discord](https://discord.gg/vrekW2ZPbp)

Yes you can use this in your modpack as long as credit is appropriately given.
